author.description: Official account for the @HSI_HQ San Juan field office in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands.

tweets.text:
During National Child Sexual Abuse Prevention Month, HSI emphasizes international cooperation in combating online crimes. In late 2024, HSI’s information led @POL_Rotterdam to arrest a 22-year-old suspect, “Turpien,” who abused 52 minors, mostly online. He threatened victims with sharing abuse material and forced them into sadistic acts. He managed two sextortion networks on Telegram. Dutch Police have initiated the #Help2Tell campaign to find more victims and offer support.

In Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands and all over the world, the international presence of HSI is key to identifying and confronting the threats posed by online child sexual predators, wherever they may be.

Protecting our children and teens is a global responsibility. Learn how to prevent these crimes by visiting @Know2Protect : https://t.co/UrazLoYdF1 or by calling the HSI San Juan Communications Center at (787) 729-6969.
#Know2Protect #K2P #iGuardian #OnlineSafety
_

Durante el Mes Nacional de Prevención del Abuso Sexual Infantil, HSI enfatiza la cooperación internacional en la lucha contra los delitos en línea. A finales de 2024, la información de HSI en Estados Unidos llevó a la Policía Holandesa a arrestar a un sospechoso de 22 años, “Turpien”, quien abusó de 52 menores, en su mayoría en línea. Amenazaba a las víctimas con compartir material de abuso y las obligaba a realizar actos sádicos. Administraba dos redes de sextorsión en Telegram. La Policía Holandesa ha iniciado la campaña #Help2Tell para encontrar más víctimas y brindar apoyo.

Ya sea en Puerto Rico, Islas Vírgenes Americanas o alrededor del mundo, la presencia internacional de HSI es clave para identificar y enfrentar las amenazas que representan los depredadores sexuales infantiles en línea, sin importar dónde se encuentren.

Proteger a nuestros menores es responsabilidad de todos. Aprende cómo prevenir estos crímenes visitando @know2protect: https://t.co/UrazLoYdF1

author.description: Official account for the @HSI_HQ San Juan field office in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands.

tweets.text: Today, as part of Operation The Last Serenade, new charges have been filed against several subjects, including Alberto Valdez, a.k.a. "Pelota," who is one of the 9 fugitives, and Jean Carlos Ramos-Valdivia, a.k.a. "Caponi," who was arrested as part of the investigation related to the organization known as "LA FARC."
tweets.text_resolved: Today, as part of Operation The Last Serenade, new charges have been filed against several subjects, including Alberto Valdez, a.k.a. "Pelota," who is one of the 9 fugitives, and Jean Carlos Ramos-Valdivia, a.k.a. "Caponi," who was arrested as part of the investigation related to the organization known as "LA FARC."

author.description: Official account for the @HSI_HQ San Juan field office in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands.

tweets.text:
🚨 FUGITIVE IN CUSTODY 🚨

In less than three days after being featured on our official social media platforms, Jonathan Hernandez-Ruiz was arrested at Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport.

This outcome underscores the critical role of coordinated efforts between law enforcement agencies. We extend our appreciation to our partners for their assistance in bringing this individual to justice.
_

🚨 PRÓFUGO BAJO CUSTODIA 🚨

En menos de tres días tras ser divulgado en nuestras plataformas oficiales de redes sociales, Jonathan Hernández-Ruiz fue arrestado en el Aeropuerto Internacional Luis Muñoz Marín.

Este resultado resalta el papel fundamental de los esfuerzos coordinados entre las agencias del orden público. Agradecemos a nuestros colaboradores por su apoyo para llevar a este individuo ante la justicia.
